phase.en: ArchitectModule 0.2.2 is live with specialist tower/landmark templates, and the Citizens/Constructor/Denizen builder chain is installed for admin-controlled slow-build testing.
phase.da: ArchitectModule 0.2.2 er live med specialiserede tower/landmark-templates, og Citizens/Constructor/Denizen-byggekæden er installeret til admin-styret slow-build test.
